name: interviewScorecard
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/hr.js). 3-arg dispatch via /api/lens/run on key 'hr.interviewScorecard'. HrActionPanel sends FLAT { candidate, scores:{dim:N} } (object map, 1-5 per dimension) and renders r.result.{totalScore,passingScore,recommendation,topStrengths[],topWeaknesses[]}. Deterministic pure compute: each dim clamped to [0,5]; totalScore = mean/5*100; passingScore=70; strengths = dims>=4, weaknesses = dims<=2. Was DEAD before the 2026-06-28 fix (handler read data.candidates[] array and returned candidates[]/topCandidate/avgScore). POISON: '12abc'->0 (dropped), 99 clamped to 5, so totalScore never leaves [0,100]. Empty scores -> empty-shape message (not a crash). Not driven by macro-assassin; pinned by server/tests/hr-lens-macros.test.js.
